description:
Retrieve PPA Tatip Synthesizers that are stuck and return to normal operation.
Hot Keys:
Windows+P
Single Tap wake up  PPA Tatip
Double Tap Open PPA Tatip options
Tripple Tap Open Tatip Dictionary File
